---
title: "Nos Publications"
listing:
  contents: pubs
  type: default
  sort: "date desc"
  page-size: 12
  image-height: "180px"
  fields: [image, title, date, categories, pdf]
  filter-ui: true
  categories: true
---

La liste des publications de l'observatoire

{{< include _templates/pubs-cards.html >}}
